title: rubus hirtus subsp. elegantulus
intro: Rubus hirtus subsp. elegantulus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Strawberry, is a subspecies of the Rubus hirtus plant, a type of wild raspberry native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus subsp. elegantulus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
